findings.title: fundamentals.md Next Steps section lacks cross-references to new pages
findings.description: AC-US5-04 requires fundamentals.md to cross-reference the installation guide and CLI reference. Links were added in a :::tip admonition at line 317, which satisfies 'where install is discussed.' However, the Next Steps section (lines 450-457) — the most natural place for discoverability — does not link to installation.md or vskill-cli.md, unlike the Next Steps sections in the 3 new pages which all cross-reference each other.
findings.recommendation: Add links to /docs/skills/installation and /docs/skills/vskill-cli in the Next Steps section for consistency with other pages.

findings.title: plugins-ecosystem.md Learning Resources section not updated
findings.description: AC-US5-03 says 'updated to link to the installation guide and CLI reference where relevant.' Links were added at the top in an :::info admonition (line 17), which is effective placement. The Learning Resources section (lines 635-641) was not updated, but this is acceptable since the AC says 'where relevant' and the top-of-page placement is arguably better for discoverability.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding links to the Learning Resources section as well, but current placement is acceptable.

findings.title: skill-studio.md placed as top-level entry, not under Ecosystem category
findings.description: AC-US4-02 says 'sidebars.ts updated to include skills/skill-studio in the Skills sidebar.' The spec's technical notes suggest placing Studio under Ecosystem. Instead, it was placed as a top-level entry at position 4 (after Installation, before Extensible Skills). This is arguably better UX — Skill Studio is a primary feature, not a secondary ecosystem page — but diverges from the original spec suggestion.
findings.recommendation: No action needed. Current placement as top-level entry gives better visibility than being nested under Ecosystem.

findings.title: sidebar_position frontmatter values differ from task spec
findings.description: installation.md has sidebar_position: 3 (task spec said 2). skill-studio.md has sidebar_position: 4 (task spec said 22). These values are inconsequential because skillsSidebar in sidebars.ts uses explicit entry ordering, not autogenerated ordering. The frontmatter sidebar_position is only used with autogenerated sidebars.
findings.recommendation: No action needed. Explicit sidebar config overrides frontmatter position values.

findings.title: CLI reference documents 13 commands, spec says 12
findings.description: The spec (AC-US3-02) says 'Documents all 12 vskill commands.' The CLI reference page documents 13 commands (install, find, info, scan, audit, list, update, remove, blocklist, submit, init, studio, eval). The task spec (T-004) itself acknowledges 13 commands. The extra command is 'info' which is a valid discovery command. The page is more complete than the spec required.
findings.recommendation: No action needed. Documenting all 13 commands is better than the spec's stated 12.

reviewerNotes: Documentation-only increment with no code logic, security surface, or performance concerns. All 31 ACs are satisfied, all 7 tasks completed. The 3 new pages are well-structured with proper Docusaurus frontmatter, comprehensive content covering all specified topics, and consistent Next Steps cross-linking. Sidebar placement is logical. The one medium finding (GR-001) is a discoverability improvement, not a correctness issue. Ship-ready.
